<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\CuckooFilter; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/cf.insertnx/ * * Adds one or more items to a cuckoo filter, allowing the filter * to be created with a custom capacity if it does not exist yet. */ class CFINSERTNX extends CFINSERT { public function getId() { return 'CF.INSERTNX'; } }
